hooks.command: sh -lc 'command -v br >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; exec br ready --limit 10'
sh -lc 'command -v br >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; exec br ready --limit 10'
git-kb daemon status --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1 || git-kb daemon start --background >/dev/null 2>&1
sh -lc 'command -v rusty-idd >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; exec rusty-idd next --base "$root"'
hooks.statusMessage: Rusty IDD front door: computing the next step
